name: gemini
description: Delegate investigation, review, and adversarial review to Gemini CLI from within Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate to Gemini CLI from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Invoke Gemini CLI headlessly from Codex for investigation, rescue, review, and adversarial-review workflows. Uses OAuth subscription (no API keys).
defaultPrompt: Ask Gemini CLI to review the current diff
Have Gemini CLI investigate a failing test
Get an adversarial review from Gemini CLI
